pageEvidence.summary: Backend route expectation for O03 was recorded with POST /api/payments/create and POST /api/payments/wechat/callback; frontend page implementation and screenshots remain assigned to T09/T10/T15.
Backend route expectation for O04 was recorded with basic prerequisite denial and full paid unlock; frontend page implementation and screenshots remain assigned to T10/T11/T15.

apiEvidence.summary: POST /api/payments/create creates a 1 CNY pending local payment, duplicate create is idempotent, and POST /api/payments/wechat/callback unlocks basic access.
Full payment before basic is denied, then 9.9 CNY full payment creates pending local payment and paid callback unlocks full access.
Validation, non-owner denial, failed callback, cancelled callback, duplicate callback, and compensation repair branches were exercised.

dbEvidence.summary: Payment readback status=paid and order readback accessLevel=basic/status=basic_paid.
Full payment readback status=paid and order readback accessLevel=full/status=full_paid.
Failed and cancelled payment readbacks do not unlock access; compensation repair readback restores basic access for an already-paid local payment.
